case_title: KWAN, ROGER vs. HASH, KENNA MARIE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWAN, ROGER AS TO DEFENDANT HASH, KENNA MARIE HASH, DONAVON JAMES
